title: Roasted Pillowy Australian Chocolate Hash
description: A quick-fix, low-glycemic-friendly dessert featuring roasted milk chocolate and cure, served in a cast-iron skillet.
instructions: Preheat cast-iron skillet over medium heat to 375°F (190°C).
In a separate pan, toast 1/4 cup almond flour over medium heat for 2 minutes.
Add the toasted almond flour to the broken milk chocolate and mix until well combined.
Transfer the chocolate mixture to the preheated skillet and roast for 5 minutes.
Add 2 tablespoons of cure to the chocolate mixture and mix until dissolved.
Roast for an additional 2 minutes, until fragrant and set.
Remove from heat and let cool for 2 minutes.
